summary: Iteration 53 - Verified 3 Dashboard fixes: (1) TAUX DE CHURN replaced ROAS in KPI cards, (2) Cash Collecte = 0.00 CHF when close=0, (3) Detail des Membres shows real-time stats (97 active members, 32 active coaches). All 7 backend tests passed + UI verification successful.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.js lines 326-337: Last KPI card correctly shows TAUX DE CHURN with data-testid='kpi-churn'
Dashboard.js lines 411-453: Objectifs du mois has 5 objectives (Churn, CAC, New Members, Marge Nette, Revenus) - NO ROAS
kpis.py line 251-252: cash_collected correctly set to 0 when close=0 in recalculate_month()
KPIDetailedView.js lines 162-163: Fetches memberStats from /api/members/stats on mount
KPIDetailedView.js lines 340-345: Detail des Membres uses memberStats for real-time values
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 53 verified Dashboard fixes: (1) KPI cards: 6th card shows 'TAUX DE CHURN' at 3.6%, (2) Objectifs du mois: 5 objectives without ROAS, (3) Entonnoir de Vente: CASH COLLECTE = 0.00 CHF when close=0, (4) Detail des Membres: real-time stats showing 97 active members, 32 active coaches from /api/members/stats. March 2026 is the test month.
